text.title: AI-Assisted Specification Writing (Planning Layer) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf either applies a concrete rule or routes to `skip-this-methodology`.

decision-tree.root-question: Is spec.md status == approved with zero open AC?

branch.question: Does the project have ≥5 tasks of expected scope?

conclusion.verdict: draft plan via LLM with human gates

example.trace: input matches `spec_status != approved OR open_ac > 0` → conclusion ref=`spec-locked-before-plan`.
